task1.title: Map: University Campus (Current vs Proposed Development)
task1.prompt:
The maps below show the current layout of a university campus and a proposed plan for its future development.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Government Investment in Science Education
task2.prompt:
Some people think that the government should invest more money in teaching science than in other subjects in order for a country to develop and progress.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
